TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Cbeyo han we, kesun alang miyan yami Seediq peni na, nniqun seediq miyan ka kiya, niqan seediq, niqan naq neepah kkpahan daha ma, niqan ddupun daha. So ka alang miyan yami Seediq ge, mddayo ma mggaalu kanna seediq knkingal alang, alang daka alang we so kiya duri. Niqan miyan snhiyan quri Utux ka yami ma, niqan miyan Gaya nami naq, spruun miyan bale qmita ka Gaya, kndalax so ooda knkingal seediq, knkingal sapah, knkingal alang ma, betaq ooda miyan kanna yami seediq, asi ka spooda Gaya kanna, meniq ka seediq smeeliq Gaya we, puqul miyan Gaya denu. Knkingal alang we, niqan kinngal seediq pdaan kari, niqan seediq psratuc, niqan seediq mpehu, niqan seediq msapuh ma seediq mplawa quyux. Rseno ka mooda so kkpahun chedin ma, mosa mgcebu camac lmiiqu, mqedin ge meepah so kkpahun slokah ma, tminun pala, lukus ma pacang. Mssbarux ka seediq alang ma msstuku, uka kesun smtuku pila, mrriyux qyqeya ma ppuqul, uka kesun mbbaruy, niqan ka seediq so wada mgedang de, spuun daha smdehu, niqan so riso weewa msteerung de, dyagun daha piimah rai duri. Niqan nami Gaya lmaqi ka yami cbeyo, kesun daha mosa mangal tunux pais peni, kiya we sniicu na pais meeyah kmremux ma, meyah smdayak dheran ma, meyah smdaku ddupun nami, irih so kklawa nami alang miyan ka lmaqi nii, uxe mmhemuc mangal tunux nseediq. Netun so mttuuqu ka seediq alang we, spooda daha Gaya mddahur de mtbale denu, mosa phuing ka rseno we, saasu daha seediq alang ka nngalan daha, ini daha liingi ma ini khkeruy. So nii ka alang miyan yami Seediq cbeyo. Alang nami saya de ini pntena di, ado ka qnlhangan mian na Tanah Tunux ma, nii miyan na qlhangan Telu ka saya dungan, kika ga miyan muyu Gaya daha di, kndudul mgedang ka Gaya nami naq yami di, ma ga miyan asi laxi hii di. Ani lqlaqi nami saya di we, ini kela rmengo kari miyan naq Seediq duri di, bale naq ba bale ka saya duri, nii miyan mngaangal mqedin ka kaalang di, uxe de mngaangal miyan mqedin ka Mukan ma Telu uri. Malu bale ka so nii duri, ado ta ka mtbale kanna seediq ga mniq Taywang hini, ani si kani laxi ka Gaya miyan naq ami ma, kani laxi ka kari miyan naq Seediq duri, nii si nglungun mu riyung ka kenan.
S.PHON: ¶b…ôo ńßan w…ô, k…ôsun alaŇč mijan jami s…ô…ôdiq p…ôni na, nniqun s…ô…ôdiq mijan ka kija, niqan s…ô…ôdiq, niqan naq n…ô…ôpańß kkpańßan dańßa ma, niqan ddupun dańßa. so ka alaŇč mijan jami s…ô…ôdiq g…ô, mddajo ma mggaalu kanna s…ô…ôdiq knkiŇčal alaŇč, alaŇč daka alaŇč w…ô so kija du…ĺi. niqan mijan snńßijan qu…ĺi utux ka jami ma, niqan mijan gaja nami naq, sp…ĺuun mijan bal…ô qmita ka gaja, kndalax so ooda knkiŇčal s…ô…ôdiq, knkiŇčal sapańß, knkiŇčal alaŇč ma, b…ôtaq ooda mijan kanna jami s…ô…ôdiq, asi ka spooda gaja kanna, m…ôniq ka s…ô…ôdiq sm…ô…ôliq gaja w…ô, puqul mijan gaja d…ônu. knkiŇčal alaŇč w…ô, niqan kinŇčal s…ô…ôdiq pdaan ka…ĺi, niqan s…ô…ôdiq ps…ĺatu ¶, niqan s…ô…ôdiq mp…ôńßu, niqan s…ô…ôdiq msapuńß ma s…ô…ôdiq mplawa qujux. …ĺs…ôno ka mooda so kkpańßun ¶ńß…ôdin ma, mosa mg ¶…ôbu ¶ama ¶ lmiiqu, mq…ôdin g…ô m…ô…ôpańß so kkpańßun slokańß ma, tminun pala, lukus ma pa ¶aŇč. mssba…ĺux ka s…ô…ôdiq alaŇč ma msstuku, uka k…ôsun smtuku pila, m…ĺ…ĺijux qjq…ôa ma ppuqul, uka k…ôsun mbba…ĺuj, niqan ka s…ô…ôdiq so wada mg…ôdaŇč d…ô, spuun dańßa smd…ôńßu, niqan so …ĺiso w…ô…ôwa mst…ô…ô…ĺuŇč d…ô, djagun dańßa piimańß …ĺai du…ĺi. niqan nami gaja lmaqi ka jami ¶b…ôo, k…ôsun dańßa mosa maŇčal tunux pais p…ôni, kija w…ô snii ¶u na pais m…ô…ôańß km…ĺ…ômux ma, m…ôańß smdajak dńß…ô…ĺan ma, m…ôańß smdaku ddupun nami, i…ĺińß so kklawa nami alaŇč mijan ka lmaqi nii, ux…ô mmńß…ômu ¶ maŇčal tunux ns…ô…ôdiq. n…ôtun so mttuuqu ka s…ô…ôdiq alaŇč w…ô, spooda dańßa gaja mddańßu…ĺ d…ô mtbal…ô d…ônu, mosa pńßuiŇč ka …ĺs…ôno w…ô, saasu dańßa s…ô…ôdiq alaŇč ka nŇčalan dańßa, ini dańßa liiŇči ma ini kńßk…ô…ĺuj. so nii ka alaŇč mijan jami s…ô…ôdiq ¶b…ôo. alaŇč nami saja d…ô ini pnt…ôna di, ado ka qnlńßaŇčan mian na tanańß tunux ma, nii mijan na qlńßaŇčan t…ôlu ka saja duŇčan, kika ga mijan muju gaja dańßa di, kndudul mg…ôdaŇč ka gaja nami naq jami di, ma ga mijan asi laxi ńßii di. ani lqlaqi nami saja di w…ô, ini k…ôla …ĺm…ôŇčo ka…ĺi mijan naq s…ô…ôdiq du…ĺi di, bal…ô naq ba bal…ô ka saja du…ĺi, nii mijan mŇčaaŇčal mq…ôdin ka kaalaŇč di, ux…ô d…ô mŇčaaŇčal mijan mq…ôdin ka mukan ma t…ôlu u…ĺi. malu bal…ô ka so nii du…ĺi, ado ta ka mtbal…ô kanna s…ô…ôdiq ga mniq tajwaŇč ńßini, ani si kani laxi ka gaja mijan naq ami ma, kani laxi ka ka…ĺi mijan naq s…ô…ôdiq du…ĺi, nii si ŇčluŇčun mu …ĺijuŇč ka k…ônan.
S.FORM: Cbeyo han we, kesun alang miyan yami Seediq peni na, nniqun seediq miyan ka kiya, niqan seediq, niqan naq neepah kkpahan daha ma, niqan ddupun daha. So ka alang miyan yami Seediq ge, mddayo ma mggaalu kanna seediq knkingal alang, alang daka alang we so kiya duri. Niqan miyan snhiyan quri Utux ka yami ma, niqan miyan Gaya nami naq, spruun miyan bale qmita ka Gaya, kndalax so ooda knkingal seediq, knkingal sapah, knkingal alang ma, betaq ooda miyan kanna yami seediq, asi ka spooda Gaya kanna, meniq ka seediq smeeliq Gaya we, puqul miyan Gaya denu. Knkingal alang we, niqan kinngal seediq pdaan kari, niqan seediq psratuc, niqan seediq mpehu, niqan seediq msapuh ma seediq mplawa quyux. Rseno ka mooda so kkpahun chedin ma, mosa mgcebu camac lmiiqu, mqedin ge meepah so kkpahun slokah ma, tminun pala, lukus ma pacang. Mssbarux ka seediq alang ma msstuku, uka kesun smtuku pila, mrriyux qyqeya ma ppuqul, uka kesun mbbaruy, niqan ka seediq so wada mgedang de, spuun daha smdehu, niqan so riso weewa msteerung de, dyagun daha piimah rai duri. Niqan nami Gaya lmaqi ka yami cbeyo, kesun daha mosa mangal tunux pais peni, kiya we sniicu na pais meeyah kmremux ma, meyah smdayak dheran ma, meyah smdaku ddupun nami, irih so kklawa nami alang miyan ka lmaqi nii, uxe mmhemuc mangal tunux nseediq. Netun so mttuuqu ka seediq alang we, spooda daha Gaya mddahur de mtbale denu, mosa phuing ka rseno we, saasu daha seediq alang ka nngalan daha, ini daha liingi ma ini khkeruy. So nii ka alang miyan yami Seediq cbeyo. Alang nami saya de ini pntena di, ado ka qnlhangan mian na Tanah Tunux ma, nii miyan na qlhangan Telu ka saya dungan, kika ga miyan muyu Gaya daha di, kndudul mgedang ka Gaya nami naq yami di, ma ga miyan asi laxi hii di. Ani lqlaqi nami saya di we, ini kela rmengo kari miyan naq Seediq duri di, bale naq ba bale ka saya duri, nii miyan mngaangal mqedin ka kaalang di, uxe de mngaangal miyan mqedin ka Mukan ma Telu uri. Malu bale ka so nii duri, ado ta ka mtbale kanna seediq ga mniq Taywang hini, ani si kani laxi ka Gaya miyan naq ami ma, kani laxi ka kari miyan naq Seediq duri, nii si nglungun mu riyung ka kenan.
S.PHON: ¶b…ôo ńßan w…ô, k…ôsun alaŇč mijan jami s…ô…ôdiq p…ôni na, nniqun s…ô…ôdiq mijan ka kija, niqan s…ô…ôdiq, niqan naq n…ô…ôpańß kkpańßan dańßa ma, niqan ddupun dańßa. so ka alaŇč mijan jami s…ô…ôdiq g…ô, mddajo ma mggaalu kanna s…ô…ôdiq knkiŇčal alaŇč, alaŇč daka alaŇč w…ô so kija du…ĺi. niqan mijan snńßijan qu…ĺi utux ka jami ma, niqan mijan gaja nami naq, sp…ĺuun mijan bal…ô qmita ka gaja, kndalax so ooda knkiŇčal s…ô…ôdiq, knkiŇčal sapańß, knkiŇčal alaŇč ma, b…ôtaq ooda mijan kanna jami s…ô…ôdiq, asi ka spooda gaja kanna, m…ôniq ka s…ô…ôdiq sm…ô…ôliq gaja w…ô, puqul mijan gaja d…ônu. knkiŇčal alaŇč w…ô, niqan kinŇčal s…ô…ôdiq pdaan ka…ĺi, niqan s…ô…ôdiq ps…ĺatu ¶, niqan s…ô…ôdiq mp…ôńßu, niqan s…ô…ôdiq msapuńß ma s…ô…ôdiq mplawa qujux. …ĺs…ôno ka mooda so kkpańßun ¶ńß…ôdin ma, mosa mg ¶…ôbu ¶ama ¶ lmiiqu, mq…ôdin g…ô m…ô…ôpańß so kkpańßun slokańß ma, tminun pala, lukus ma pa ¶aŇč. mssba…ĺux ka s…ô…ôdiq alaŇč ma msstuku, uka k…ôsun smtuku pila, m…ĺ…ĺijux qjq…ôa ma ppuqul, uka k…ôsun mbba…ĺuj, niqan ka s…ô…ôdiq so wada mg…ôdaŇč d…ô, spuun dańßa smd…ôńßu, niqan so …ĺiso w…ô…ôwa mst…ô…ô…ĺuŇč d…ô, djagun dańßa piimańß …ĺai du…ĺi. niqan nami gaja lmaqi ka jami ¶b…ôo, k…ôsun dańßa mosa maŇčal tunux pais p…ôni, kija w…ô snii ¶u na pais m…ô…ôańß km…ĺ…ômux ma, m…ôańß smdajak dńß…ô…ĺan ma, m…ôańß smdaku ddupun nami, i…ĺińß so kklawa nami alaŇč mijan ka lmaqi nii, ux…ô mmńß…ômu ¶ maŇčal tunux ns…ô…ôdiq. n…ôtun so mttuuqu ka s…ô…ôdiq alaŇč w…ô, spooda dańßa gaja mddańßu…ĺ d…ô mtbal…ô d…ônu, mosa pńßuiŇč ka …ĺs…ôno w…ô, saasu dańßa s…ô…ôdiq alaŇč ka nŇčalan dańßa, ini dańßa liiŇči ma ini kńßk…ô…ĺuj. so nii ka alaŇč mijan jami s…ô…ôdiq ¶b…ôo. alaŇč nami saja d…ô ini pnt…ôna di, ado ka qnlńßaŇčan mian na tanańß tunux ma, nii mijan na qlńßaŇčan t…ôlu ka saja duŇčan, kika ga mijan muju gaja dańßa di, kndudul mg…ôdaŇč ka gaja nami naq jami di, ma ga mijan asi laxi ńßii di. ani lqlaqi nami saja di w…ô, ini k…ôla …ĺm…ôŇčo ka…ĺi mijan naq s…ô…ôdiq du…ĺi di, bal…ô naq ba bal…ô ka saja du…ĺi, nii mijan mŇčaaŇčal mq…ôdin ka kaalaŇč di, ux…ô d…ô mŇčaaŇčal mijan mq…ôdin ka mukan ma t…ôlu u…ĺi. malu bal…ô ka so nii du…ĺi, ado ta ka mtbal…ô kanna s…ô…ôdiq ga mniq tajwaŇč ńßini, ani si kani laxi ka gaja mijan naq ami ma, kani laxi ka ka…ĺi mijan naq s…ô…ôdiq du…ĺi, nii si ŇčluŇčun mu …ĺijuŇč ka k…ônan.
